name: Castle of Dark Illusions
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>闇</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>やみ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>晦</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>くら</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>ましの<ruby lang="jp"><rb>城</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>しろ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
desc: FLIP: Increases the ATK and DEF of all Zombie-Type monsters by 200 points. As long as this card remains face-up on the field, the ATK and DEF of Zombie-Type monsters continues to increase by 200 points during each of your Standby Phases. This effect continues until your 4th turn after the card is activated.
